words.exampleArabic: يُفَضِّلُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ الشَّيَّ فِي الْهَوَاءِ الطَّلْقِ.
words.exampleBs: Mnogi ljudi preferiraju roštiljanje na svježem zraku.
words.exampleEn: Many people prefer grilling in the open air.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْقَلْيُ إِلَى كَمِيَّةٍ كَافِيَةٍ مِنَ الزَّيْتِ وَحَرَارَةٍ مُنَاسِبَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Prženje zahtijeva dovoljnu količinu ulja i odgovarajuću temperaturu.
words.exampleEn: Frying requires a sufficient amount of oil and appropriate heat.

words.exampleArabic: الطَّبْخُ بِالْبُخَارِ يَحْفَظُ الْعَنَاصِرَ الْغِذَائِيَّةَ فِي الْخَضَرَوَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Kuhanje na pari čuva nutritivne tvari u povrću.
words.exampleEn: Steaming preserves the nutritional elements in vegetables.

words.exampleArabic: يُضِيفُ التَّتْبِيلُ نَكْهَةً غَنِيَّةً لِلَّحْمِ.
words.exampleBs: Mariniranje dodaje bogat okus mesu.
words.exampleEn: Marinating adds a rich flavor to the meat.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَكَوَّنُ التَّتْبِيلَةُ مِنَ الثُّومِ وَالْبَهَارَاتِ وَعَصِيرِ اللَّيْمُونِ.
words.exampleBs: Marinade se sastoji od češnjaka, začina i limunovog soka.
words.exampleEn: The marinade consists of garlic, spices, and lemon juice.

words.exampleArabic: سَخِّنِ الْفُرْنَ إِلَى مِائَتَيْنِ دَرَجَةٍ قَبْلَ وَضْعِ الْعَجِينِ.
words.exampleBs: Zagrij pećnicu na dvjesta stepeni prije stavljanja tijesta.
words.exampleEn: Preheat the oven to two hundred degrees before placing the dough.

words.exampleArabic: اسْتَخْدَمَتِ الْخَلَّاطَ لِتَحْضِيرِ عَصِيرِ الْفَاكِهَةِ الطَّازَجَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Koristila je blender za pripremu svježeg voćnog soka.
words.exampleEn: She used the blender to prepare fresh fruit juice.

words.exampleArabic: سَخِّنِ الْمِقْلَاةَ عَلَى نَارٍ مُتَوَسِّطَةٍ ثُمَّ أَضِفِ الزَّيْتَ.
words.exampleBs: Zagrijte tavu na srednjoj vatri, zatim dodajte ulje.
words.exampleEn: Heat the frying pan over medium heat then add oil.

words.exampleArabic: ضَعِ الْمَاءَ فِي الْقِدْرِ وَاتْرُكْهُ حَتَّى يَغْلِيَ.
words.exampleBs: Stavi vodu u lonac i ostavi je da proključa.
words.exampleEn: Place water in the pot and leave it until it boils.

words.exampleArabic: اسْتَخْدِمْ كُوبَ الْقِيَاسِ لِضَمَانِ النِّسَبِ الصَّحِيحَةِ فِي الْوَصْفَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Koristite mjernu čašu da osigurate točne omjere u receptu.
words.exampleEn: Use the measuring cup to ensure correct proportions in the recipe.

words.exampleArabic: نَخَّلِي الطَّحِينَ جَيِّدًا قَبْلَ إِضَافَتِهِ إِلَى الْعَجِينِ.
words.exampleBs: Dobro prosijte brašno prije dodavanja u tijesto.
words.exampleEn: Sift the flour well before adding it to the dough.

words.exampleArabic: تُعْطِي الْخَمِيرَةُ الْخُبْزَ طَعْمَهُ الْمُمَيَّزَ وَتَجْعَلُهُ خَفِيفًا.
words.exampleBs: Kvasac daje kruhu njegov karakteristični okus i čini ga laganim.
words.exampleEn: Yeast gives bread its distinctive taste and makes it light.

words.exampleArabic: أَضَفْتُ مَلْعَقَةً مِنَ الْبَيْكِنْغ بَاودِر لِجَعْلِ الْكَعْكَةِ أَخَفَّ.
words.exampleBs: Dodala sam žlicu praška za pecivo da biskvit bude laganiji.
words.exampleEn: I added a spoon of baking powder to make the cake lighter.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ زَيْتُ الزَّيْتُونِ مِنْ أَصِحِّ الزُّيُوتِ لِلطَّبْخِ وَالسَّلَطَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Maslinovo ulje smatra se jednim od najzdravijih ulja za kuhanje i salate.
words.exampleEn: Olive oil is considered one of the healthiest oils for cooking and salads.

words.exampleArabic: يُضِيفُ الْخَلُّ حَمْضِيَّةً مُوَازِنَةً لِطَعْمِ السَّلَطَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Ocat dodaje kiselost koja uravnotežuje okus salata.
words.exampleEn: Vinegar adds acidity that balances the taste of salads.

words.exampleArabic: تُضِيفُ الْأَعْشَابُ الطَّازَجَةُ نَكْهَةً رَائِعَةً لِلْأَطْبَاقِ.
words.exampleBs: Svježe začinsko bilje dodaje predivan okus jelima.
words.exampleEn: Fresh herbs add a wonderful flavor to dishes.

words.exampleArabic: الْمَنْدِيُّ الْيَمَنِيُّ مِنْ أَشْهَرِ الْأَطْبَاقِ فِي مَطَاعِمِ الشَّرْقِ الأَوْسَطِ.
words.exampleBs: Jemenski mandi jedno je od najpopularnijih jela u restoranima Bliskog istoka.
words.exampleEn: Yemeni mandi is one of the most famous dishes in Middle Eastern restaurants.

words.bs: kabsa (začinjeno jelo od riže i mesa)
words.exampleArabic: الْكَبْسَةُ الطَّبَقُ الْوَطَنِيُّ فِي الْمَمْلَكَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ السَّعُودِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Kabsa je nacionalno jelo Saudijske Arabije.
words.exampleEn: Kabsa is the national dish of Saudi Arabia.

words.exampleArabic: الشَّاوِرْمَا وَجْبَةٌ سَرِيعَةٌ شَائِعَةٌ فِي الشَّوَارِعِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Šawarma je popularni brzi obrok na arapskim ulicama.
words.exampleEn: Shawarma is a popular fast food on Arab streets.

words.exampleArabic: الْفَلَافِلُ وَجْبَةٌ نَبَاتِيَّةٌ مَشْهُورَةٌ مَصْنُوعَةٌ مِنَ الْحِمَّصِ.
words.exampleBs: Falafel je poznati vegetarijanski obrok napravljen od leblebija.
words.exampleEn: Falafel is a famous vegetarian dish made from chickpeas.

words.exampleArabic: يُوزَّعُ الزَّعْتَرُ عَلَى الْخُبْزِ مَعَ زَيْتِ الزَّيْتُونِ لِوَجْبَةٍ لَذِيذَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Za'atar se raspoređuje po kruhu s maslinovim uljem za ukusni obrok.
words.exampleEn: Za'atar is spread on bread with olive oil for a delicious meal.

words.exampleArabic: تَدْخُلُ الطَّحِينِيَّةُ فِي تَحْضِيرِ الْحُمُّصِ وَالْفَلَافِلِ.
words.exampleBs: Tahini se koristi u pripremi humusa i falafela.
words.exampleEn: Tahini is used in preparing hummus and falafel.

words.bs: kibbeh (jelo od mljevenog mesa i bulgura)
words.exampleArabic: الْكُبَّةُ مِنْ أَشْهَرِ الْأَطْبَاقِ فِي الْمَطْبَخِ الشَّامِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Kibbeh je jedno od najpoznatijih jela levantske kuhinje.
words.exampleEn: Kibbeh is one of the most famous dishes in Levantine cuisine.

words.exampleArabic: يُقَدَّمُ الْحُمُّصُ مَعَ الْخُبْزِ الْعَرَبِيِّ كَمُقَبِّلٍ لَذِيذٍ.
words.exampleBs: Humus se poslužuje s arapskim kruhom kao ukusni međuobrok.
words.exampleEn: Hummus is served with Arabic bread as a delicious appetizer.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْجِسْمُ إِلَى كَمِيَّةٍ كَافِيَةٍ مِنَ الْبَرُوتِينِ يَوْمِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Tijelo svakodnevno treba dovoljnu količinu proteina.
words.exampleEn: The body needs a sufficient amount of protein daily.

words.exampleArabic: الْكَرْبُوهَيْدْرَاتُ مَصْدَرٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ لِلطَّاقَةِ فِي جِسْمِ الإِنْسَانِ.
words.exampleBs: Ugljikohidrati su osnovni izvor energije u ljudskom tijelu.
words.exampleEn: Carbohydrates are a primary source of energy in the human body.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْسِبُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ السُّعَرَاتِ الْحَرَارِيَّةَ فِي كُلِّ وَجْبَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Sportaš broji kalorije u svakom obroku.
words.exampleEn: The athlete counts the calories in each meal.

words.exampleArabic: الْأَلْيَافُ الْغِذَائِيَّةُ مُهِمَّةٌ لِصِحَّةِ الْجِهَازِ الْهَضْمِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Prehrambena vlakna su važna za zdravlje probavnog sustava.
words.exampleEn: Dietary fiber is important for digestive system health.

words.exampleArabic: تُفَضِّلُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الْأُسَرِ شِرَاءَ الْخَضَرَوَاتِ الْعُضْوِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Mnoge porodice preferiraju kupovinu organskog povrća.
words.exampleEn: Many families prefer buying organic vegetables.

words.exampleArabic: طَلَبَ النَّادِلُ قَائِمَةَ الطَّعَامِ لِلضُّيُوفِ.
words.exampleBs: Konobar je donio jelovnik gostima.
words.exampleEn: The waiter brought the menu to the guests.

words.exampleArabic: طَلَبَ الضُّيُوفُ مُقَبِّلَاتٍ مُتَنَوِّعَةً قَبْلَ الطَّبَقِ الرَّئِيسِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Gosti su naručili raznovrsna predjela prije glavnog jela.
words.exampleEn: The guests ordered various appetizers before the main course.

words.exampleArabic: اخْتَارَ الطَّبَقَ الرَّئِيسِيَّ مِنَ الْأَسْمَاكِ الْمَشْوِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Odabrao je glavno jelo od roštilja od ribe.
words.exampleEn: He chose the main course from the grilled fish.

words.exampleArabic: اخْتَتَمُوا الْوَلِيمَةَ بِحَلْوَى الأُمِّ عَلِيٍّ الشَّهِيرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Završili su svečanu večeru poznatim desertom Umm Ali.
words.exampleEn: They ended the feast with the famous Umm Ali dessert.

words.exampleArabic: أَوْصَى النَّادِلُ بِطَبَقِ الشَّيفِ الْخَاصِّ لِهَذَا الْيَوْمِ.
words.exampleBs: Konobar je preporučio današnji specijalitet kuhara.
words.exampleEn: The waiter recommended the chef's special for today.

words.exampleArabic: يُنْصَحُ بِحَجْزِ طَاوِلَةٍ مُسْبَقًا فِي هَذَا الْمَطْعَمِ الشَّهِيرِ.
words.exampleBs: Preporučuje se unaprijed rezervirati stol u ovom poznatom restoranu.
words.exampleEn: It is advised to book a table in advance at this famous restaurant.

words.exampleArabic: وَجَدَتِ الْوَصْفَةَ عَلَى الإِنْتَرْنِتِ وَجَرَّبَتْهَا فِي الْمَنْزِلِ.
words.exampleBs: Pronašla je recept na internetu i isprobala ga kod kuće.
words.exampleEn: She found the recipe online and tried it at home.

words.exampleArabic: تَحَقَّقَتْ مِنَ الْمُكَوِّنَاتِ قَبْلَ الْبَدْءِ فِي الطَّبْخِ.
words.exampleBs: Provjerila je sastojke prije nego što je počela kuhati.
words.exampleEn: She checked the ingredients before starting to cook.

words.exampleArabic: يَشْتَهِرُ الْمَطْبَخُ الْعَرَبِيُّ بِاسْتِخْدَامِ الْبَهَارَاتِ الْعَطِرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Arapska kuhinja poznata je po korištenju aromatičnih začina.
words.exampleEn: Arab cuisine is famous for using aromatic spices.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَظَرَ حَتَّى بَدَأَ الْغَلَيَانُ ثُمَّ خَفَّضَ الْحَرَارَةَ.
words.exampleBs: Čekao je dok ne počne ključanje, pa je smanjio temperaturu.
words.exampleEn: He waited until boiling began then reduced the heat.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْعَجِينُ إِلَى وَقْتٍ كَافٍ لِلتَّخْمِيرِ قَبْلَ الْخَبْزِ.
words.exampleBs: Tijesto treba dovoljno vremena za fermentaciju prije pečenja.
words.exampleEn: The dough needs sufficient time for fermentation before baking.

words.exampleArabic: ضَعِ الْحَلْوَى فِي الثَّلَّاجَةِ لِلتَّبَرُّدِ قَبْلَ التَّقْدِيمِ.
words.exampleBs: Stavi desert u frižider da se rashladi prije posluživanja.
words.exampleEn: Place the dessert in the refrigerator to cool before serving.

words.exampleArabic: تَمْلَأُ رَائِحَةُ الْخَبِيزِ الطَّازَجِ أَرْجَاءَ الْمَنْزِلِ.
words.exampleBs: Miris svježeg peciva ispunjava uglove kuće.
words.exampleEn: The smell of fresh baked goods fills every corner of the house.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ الْمَطَاعِمُ اللُّبْنَانِيَّةُ بِمَشْوِيَّاتِهَا اللَّذِيذَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Libanonski restorani poznati su po ukusnim roštilja jelima.
words.exampleEn: Lebanese restaurants are distinguished by their delicious grilled dishes.

words.exampleArabic: تَشْتَهِرُ مَطَاعِمُ الْإِسْكَنْدَرِيَّةِ بِالْمَأْكُولَاتِ الْبَحْرِيَّةِ الطَّازَجَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Restorani u Aleksandriji poznati su po svježim morskim plodovima.
words.exampleEn: Alexandria's restaurants are famous for fresh seafood.

words.exampleArabic: تَبُوُّلَةٌ سَلَطَةٌ شَامِيَّةٌ مُرَكَّبَةٌ مِنَ الْبَقْدُونِسِ وَالطَّمَاطِمِ وَالْبُرْغُلِ.
words.exampleBs: Tabbouleh je levantska salata sastavljena od peršuna, paradajza i bulgura.
words.exampleEn: Tabbouleh is a Levantine salad made of parsley, tomatoes, and bulgur.

words.exampleArabic: يُفَضِّلُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ السُّعُودِيِّينَ الطَّعَامَ الْحَارَّ.
words.exampleBs: Mnogi Saudijci preferiraju ljutu hranu.
words.exampleEn: Many Saudis prefer spicy food.

words.exampleArabic: تُشْتَهَرُ الْكُنَافَةُ بِطَعْمِهَا الْحُلْوِ الْفَرِيدِ.
words.exampleBs: Kunafa je poznata po svom jedinstvenom slatkom okusu.
words.exampleEn: Kunafa is famous for its unique sweet taste.

words.exampleArabic: الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ الأَصِيلَةُ طَعْمُهَا مُرٌّ قَلِيلًا وَعَطِرَةٌ.
words.exampleBs: Izvorna arapska kafa ima pomalo gorak okus i mirisna je.
words.exampleEn: Authentic Arabic coffee has a slightly bitter taste and is aromatic.

words.exampleArabic: الطَّعَامُ الْمَالِحُ كَثِيرًا يَضُرُّ بِصِحَّةِ الْقَلْبِ.
words.exampleBs: Previše slana hrana šteti zdravlju srca.
words.exampleEn: Overly salty food is harmful to heart health.

words.exampleArabic: يَطْبُخُ وَالِدِي أَطْبَاقًا تَقْلِيدِيَّةً فِي عُطَلِ نِهَايَةِ الْأُسْبُوعِ.
words.exampleBs: Moj otac kuha tradicionalna jela vikendom.
words.exampleEn: My father cooks traditional dishes on weekends.

words.exampleArabic: تَخْبِزُ جَدَّتِي الْخُبْزَ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ عَلَى الطَّرِيقَةِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Moja baka peče kruh svako jutro na tradicionalan način.
words.exampleEn: My grandmother bakes bread every morning in the traditional way.

words.exampleArabic: يُقَدِّمُ النَّادِلُ الطَّعَامَ بِأُسْلُوبٍ أَنِيقٍ.
words.exampleBs: Konobar servira jelo na elegantan način.
words.exampleEn: The waiter serves the food in an elegant manner.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَذَوَّقُ الطَّاهِي الطَّعَامَ بِانْتِظَامٍ لِضَمَانِ الْجَوْدَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Kuhar redovno kuša jelo kako bi osigurao kvalitetu.
words.exampleEn: The chef tastes the food regularly to ensure quality.

words.exampleArabic: يَنْقَعُ اللَّحْمَ فِي التَّتْبِيلَةِ لَيْلَةً كَامِلَةً.
words.exampleBs: Meso namače u marinadi cijelu noć.
words.exampleEn: He soaks the meat in the marinade for a whole night.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْرِصُ عَلَى تَنَاوُلِ وَجَبَاتٍ صَحِّيَّةٍ مُتَوَازِنَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Vodi računa o konzumiranju zdravih i uravnoteženih obroka.
words.exampleEn: He is keen on eating healthy and balanced meals.
